title: CLEVAST Bamboo Charcoal Air Purifying Bags (Large, 4×200g), Removes Odors and Moisture, Nature Fresh Air Purifier Bags, Odor Eliminator for Home, Car, Pets, Bathroom, Basement
features: 100% NATURAL ODOUR ELIMINATOR: The bamboo charcoal air purifying bags are made of 100% natural bamboo charcoal, without any fragrance and chemicals. They are safe for children and pets. The performance of absorption is better, effectively remove odors and bring fresh air.

REUSABLE FOR 2 YEARS: Rejuvenate the activated charcoal odour absorber by placing them under direct sunlight once a month for about two hours. It releases the void of bamboo charcoal, restores the effectiveness, and maintains the service life of the bag for up to 2 years.

EFFECTIVELY REMOVES ODORS: activated charcoal air freshener odor absorber 10x than regular charcoal bags, eliminating musty odors with ease. We recommend placing multiple air purifying bags in different areas around the house to maximize the air purification effect.

MULTIPURPOSE FRESHENER: They are composed of durable burlap bag with a built-in metal hook design that is easy to use and carry. Place them in any corner of your car, shoes, kitchen, bathroom, refrigerator, gym bag, and more! Ideal as a sho odor eliminator, car air purifier, and basement odor eliminator.

EXCELLENT CUSTOMER SERVICE: Our charcoal air freshener creates an adsorption circle around itself, with its adsorption capacity decreasing over distanc. Therefore placing charcoal bags in different directions can expand the natural adsorption range in large spaces, achieving rapid purification. Customers are at the center of all we do. If you have any issues with this bamboo charcoal bag, please contact us.
description: Product Description MULTIPURPOSE FRESHENER Protect your home from musty odors and unwanted moisture with Clevast Bamboo Charcoal Air Purifying Bags! They are made with 100% natural bamboo charcoals so you can be assured they are safe for the whole family including your furry friends at home. It's fragrance-free and chemical-free. These air purifying bags effectively remove and fight odors and freshen up every corner of your home. You can also place them on your car, shoes, refrigerator, and cabinets or in any furniture or wherever needed. NOTES: 1. Please use according to the coverage area of each package. Expose it in the sun for 2 hours at least once a month. 2. The Clevast 100% natural bamboo charcoal bag has no fragrance or other chemical additives. You may feel that the deodorization effect is slower, please wait for a while or put more charcoal bags. The charcoal bag is designed and intended to absorb odors and not to mask the odors with pleasant fragrance. It is natural and healthier than chemical deodorants. Effectivity Date Recording You can easily and simply record the date you used the bag for the first time so you would know when will it expire. The bag can last up to 2 years. This is convenient and really simple to follow. Fine Porous for Strong Adsorption Our bamboo charcoal particles are designed to be just the right size for your needs. If the size is too big, the adsorption effect would be less and insufficient and if it's too small, it would easily leak out of the bag. Lasts Up To 2 Years Each bag is reusable for up to two years. Just place them under direct sunlight for 2 hours at least once a month and they will be good to use again. After 2 years, you can use the bamboo charcoal as a fertilizer for your garden. 4 Pack 14 Pack Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 5,711 4.0 out of 5 stars 5,711 Price £19.99 £ 19 . 99 £19.99 £ 19 . 99 Remove Moisture ✓ ✓ Remove ordors ✓ ✓ Dimensions 1 6.81*5.59 inches 6.81*5.59 inches Dimensions 2 no data 6.30*2.76 inches Package Content 4x200g 2x200g+12x50g
